title: Fix share dialog title showing 'Settings' instead of 'Share'

requirements.text: In the TimerVisibilityBar settings dialog, when the user navigates to the 'Share' tab, the dialog title must display 'Share' instead of 'Settings'. The dialog title and subtitle should update to reflect the currently active tab — specifically, the Share tab should show a title of 'Share' (and an appropriate subtitle) rather than the generic 'Settings' heading.

quotes: whenever I click on 'share', it shows me this. Can you make it say 'share' instead of 'settings'?

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the 'Share' tab in the settings dialog shows 'Share' as the dialog title, not 'Settings'.
The dialog title updates dynamically based on the selected tab.
Other tabs (Background, Music, Alerts, Timer Tabs) continue to display 'Settings' or their own appropriate titles without regression.

nonGoals: Changing the visual styling of the dialog or its tabs.
Modifying the Share tab's content or functionality.
